Problem description

I want to plot bubble maps with pie charts as the face of each bubble. 

### Feature description

Hello, I use Bokeh and Pane for all of my interactive python. I would like to make a bubble map for each well in an oil field where the size of the bubble relates to total oil production and bubble is actually a pie chart showing total oil and water production at each well. 



### Potential alternatives

I really do not have an alternative because what I am proposing is the norm in my industry. 

### Additional information

In the example below the red piece of the pie chart is oil production and the blue piece is water production. 


![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/79f281c3-65b3-4df6-af16-4ea9b3ce8c36)

See, for example:

![](https://stlearn.readthedocs.io/en/latest/_images/tutorials_ST_deconvolution_visualization_22_0.png)

https://stlearn.readthedocs.io/en/latest/tutorials/ST_deconvolution_visualization.html

Or [Figure 5I here](https://www.nature.com/articles/s42003-024-07001-y), which would benefit greatly from Bokeh's interactive features. 

The [scatterbar](https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2024.08.14.606810v1.full) variant might be something to keep in mind as well:
